title: Örebro Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is hitting Örebro with a Z-Score of -3.03. This event has a critical score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current cold snap in Örebro is causing extremely low temperatures, with a Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 11.6 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 38% and the wind speed is moderate at 7.6 km/h. 
 The absence of Cooling Degree Days (CDD) indicates no heat-related stress, but the cold temperatures will still have significant impacts.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of this critical cold snap in Örebro.
